title: SMP PvP Essentials
description: This texture pack, SMP PvP Essentials, will help you climb the ranks in SMP!
body:
A **SMP TexturePack** to up your game in SMP! Here’s what it changes:

* Low Fire
* Low Shield
* Small items (Food, XP bottles, etc.)
* Non-obstructive Particles + No particles in blocks
* Knockback 1 sword is red [CIT RESEWN REQUIRED]

This pack is designed to enhance your performance in SMP by providing **clearer visuals** and **better timing cues**. The low fire and shield make it easier to see your surroundings, while the small item sizes ensure you won’t be distracted by oversized icons. Non-obstructive particles keep your view clean, and the red Knockback 1 sword helps distinguish it from the regular sword. Download it now to gain a tactical advantage and excel in your SMP gameplay!
